name: claude-codex-bridge
description: Local CLI-first bridge for bidirectional Claude Code and Codex review loops.
author: Claude-Codex Bridge contributors

scripts.check: node --check agent-bridge/bridge.mjs && node --check agent-bridge/install-global.mjs && node --check plugins/claude-codex-bridge/scripts/send-to-codex.mjs && node --check plugins/claude-codex-bridge/scripts/send-to-claude.mjs && node --check plugins/claude-codex-bridge/scripts/send-to-claude-for-audit.mjs && node --check plugins/claude-codex-bridge/scripts/send-file-to-claude.mjs && node --check .claude/skills/claude-codex-bridge/scripts/send-to-codex.mjs && node --check .claude/skills/claude-codex-bridge/scripts/send-file-to-codex.mjs
